# מסיבת שכבת איתן — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A school grade party website for 'Shevet Itan' (Itan grade/cohort), designed to sell event tickets at 70 NIS each. The site features multiple payment options (Bit, PayPal, Paybox, credit card), sends digital tickets via email after purchase, includes a legal agreement/terms stating tickets are exclusively for Itan grade members only, and collects full buyer details during checkout. The design should be visually appealing with dynamic/animated features while remaining simple and intuitive in its core user flow.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://eitan-grade-party.zappy5.app
הצטרפו לחוויית המסיבה של שכבת איתן במחיר 70 ש״ח בלבד! רכשו כרטיס בקלי קלות עם מגוון אמצעי תשלום, וקבלו אותו מיד למייל. המקומות מוגבלים — אל תפספסו את האירוע השכבתי הכי מדובר!

### תודה שפניתם | מסיבת שכבת איתן
https://eitan-grade-party.zappy5.app/thank-you
מסיבת שכבת איתן - תודה שפניתם | מסיבת שכבת איתן

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://eitan-grade-party.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://eitan-grade-party.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מסיבת שכבת איתן
A school grade party website for 'Shevet Itan' (Itan grade/cohort), designed to sell event tickets at 70 NIS each. The site features multiple payment options (Bit, PayPal, Paybox, credit card), sends digital tickets via email after purchase, includes a legal agreement/terms stating tickets are exclusively for Itan grade members only, and collects full buyer details during checkout. The design should be visually appealing with dynamic/animated features while remaining simple and intuitive in its core user flow.

## Target Audience
- תלמידי שכבת איתן בלבד
- תלמידי שכבת איתן

## Industry
Event Ticketing
